First time Pretty Bird has been played since 9.19.18 and first time at a Dave & Tim show since 4.4.17.
First time Seek Up has been played at a Dave & Tim show since 4.7.17.
First time Why I Am has been played at a Dave & Tim show since 2.16.20.
First time Too Much has been played at a Dave & Tim show since 2.20.22.
First time Up on Cripple Creek has been played since 2.5.06 and first time ever at a Dave & Tim show (it was also played by Secret Stash on 8.26.17).
First time Funny How Time Slips Away has been played at a Dave & Tim show since 6.18.19.

This show was broadcast on SiriusXM Channel 30 (Dave Matthews Band Radio) on Friday, April 5, 2024.
